{{Quote|Blast! Looks like the Imperials are wise to my setup!|Helfin Hundi|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Helfin Hundi''' was a [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] who operated in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] sometime after [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. An [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]], he was engaged in selling [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shipping manifests to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. He was arrested by a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] working on behalf of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateCommoner.png|250px|thumb|Every possible depiction of Helfin Hundi in ''Star Wars Galaxies'']]
Helfin Hundi was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. In the game, his species was randomly generated each time a player performed the quest, but the ''[[Squadrons Over Corellia]]'' card established him as a Nikto.
